title: 5. Extraordinary connection of stomach and pericardium: The combination of Neigu
text:
(ST36) effectively treats stomach, heart, lung organ diseases, and many internal diseases, for example:
digestive, circulation and respiratory system disorders.  The effectiveness is through the extraordinary
connection of the pericardium and stomach.  This point combination is the most commonly used one in
regulating heart, stomach and respiratory systems.
